segments.text: imagine you went to a movie theater to
watch a movie do you make up the story
line in your mind before you go into the
theater no what you do is you go in with
an open mind and you allow the story
line to reveal itself in front of you
you allow the characters in the movie to
show you who they are and what they're
like which is why you able to be present
in the experience and actually enjoy the
movie apply the same concept to social
situations do not premeditate on what's
going to happen do not premeditate or
think about the sequence of events
beforehand that's how you feel more
comfortable in social situations allow
the experience to show itself to you
allow the experience to show you what it
is and that's how you deal with social
anxiety think about it
